results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√śī Ā. -śete (pr.p. -śayāna; ind.p. -śayya),
to grow languid, become feeble,  MW. ;
to waver, be uncertain or irresolute or doubtful, hesitate,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to despair of (loc.),  Kathās. ;
to lie down for rest,  MW. ;
(P. -śayati), to differ in opinion or disagree about (acc.),  Yājñ., Sch.

results.rendered_html:
saṃśī 2 A.
1 To waver, be in
(pb) doubt or suspense, be uncertain or irresolute saṃśayya kaṇīdiṣu tiṣṭhate yaḥ  Ki. 3. 14 , 42. ;  Bv. 2. 115. 
2 To lie down for rest, sleep.
